svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="luban-render-arch" id="luban1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-624" dy="-162" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1180" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="r1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="PageSchema
(root + formState)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="490" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="r1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="r2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="r1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="r3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="RuntimeRenderer
(运行态:渲染+发事件)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="120" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="DesignRenderer
(编辑态:渲染+wrapper)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="860" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="wrapper(选中描边 / 空容器占位 / drop 监听)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="830" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="r3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="r4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="共用 Vue 组件库
(LubanButton / LubanForm ...)
registry 取实例,组件无感" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="430" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="r2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="r5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="r3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="r5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="ComponentMeta.propSchema
schema as form 驱动属性面板" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="860" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="r5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="r6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="宿主 / 事件总线
引擎不持状态,只发事件" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="120" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="r5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="r7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#1e293b;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;spacingTop=6;" value="运行态 / 编辑态 / 共用组件 三层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="1040" x="80" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
